## Next Steps

1. **FastAPI Lifespan Migration** - Convert `@app.on_event("startup/shutdown")` to lifespan context manager
2. **Large File Refactoring** - Consider breaking up files >800 lines (admin.py, chat.py, agents.py)
3. **Increase Test Coverage** - Current: 55 tests, Target: 75+
